To enable the request to get all the patients who are assigned with the doctor 
I created the method public List<Patients> getAllDoctorPatients(int dId) in {Patients Service file}
I added "List<Patients> findByDoctor_dId(int dId);" to {PatientsRepository} so that it generates the query automatically for the method
I added the method with name "List<Patients> getAllDoctorPatients(int dId);" to {PatientsService}
I implemented the method in {PatientsServiceImpl} by "@Override
	public List<Patients> getAllDoctorPatients(int dId) {
		// TODO Auto-generated method stub
		return pr.findByDoctor_dId(dId);
	}" .
	
And i mapped that in Controller
